thinking.text: The user has requested to be transferred to a human agent. They've been unable to verify their identity with the required two pieces of information, and they want to get this resolved. I should transfer them to a human agent with an appropriate reason and summary.

tool_calls.Name: transfer_to_human_agents
tool_calls.Arguments: {"reason": "customer_requests_human_no_specific_reason", "summary": "Customer Kenji Tanaka (user ID: 6680a37184) wants to update their email address on file. They were able to verify their phone number (206-555-0293), but the email address they provided (kenji.tanaka@gmail.com) does not match the email on file (kenji.tanaka@outlook.com). The customer does not have their date of birth or address available to complete the second verification step. They requested to speak with a human agent to resolve this."}
